task_completion.description: Verify that a Daily chart for SPY is open in NinjaTrader 8.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A chart window is visible with 'SPY' and 'Daily' (or '1 Day') indicated in the chart tab, title bar, or data series label.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Risk-Reward drawing tool is selected or being used.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Risk/Reward' tool is highlighted in the drawing tools dropdown menu (pencil icon), or the Risk-Reward drawing object is visible on the chart.

task_completion.description: Verify the Entry Price is set to 450.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The middle line (entry level) of the Risk-Reward drawing aligns with 450.00 on the chart's right-hand y-axis, or is shown as 450.00 in the drawing's properties dialog/on-chart text.

task_completion.description: Verify the Stop Loss Price is set to 455.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The upper line of the Risk-Reward drawing (representing the stop loss for a short trade) aligns with 455.00 on the y-axis. The area between 450.00 and 455.00 is typically shaded as the risk zone.

task_completion.description: Verify the Profit Target Price is set to 435.00.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The lower line of the Risk-Reward drawing (representing the profit target for a short trade) aligns with 435.00 on the y-axis. The area between 450.00 and 435.00 is typically shaded as the reward zone.

task_completion.description: Verify the workspace is saved to persist the drawing.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Workspaces' menu in the NinjaTrader Control Center is open with the user clicking 'Save' or 'Save As', or a workspace save confirmation dialog is visible.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual NinjaTrader 8 GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the standard NinjaTrader 8 interface (Control Center, Chart windows) being clicked and navigated, rather than a text editor or image manipulation tool.

integrity.description: Verify the drawing and saving were performed via the UI, not via terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no command prompt, PowerShell, or terminal windows open where the agent is injecting XML into the workspace files directly.

integrity.description: Verify the actual Risk-Reward tool was used, not individual lines.
integrity.visual_evidence: The drawing appears as a cohesive Risk-Reward object (typically with shaded risk/reward zones and connected lines), rather than three separate, disconnected horizontal lines drawn manually.

privileged_info_for_vlm: SPY is the State Street SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust. RiskReward is a built-in drawing tool in NinjaTrader 8. For a short position setup, the stop loss must be placed above the entry price (455.00 > 450.00) and the profit target must be placed below the entry price (435.00 < 450.00). The default workspace directory is C:\Users\Docker\Documents\NinjaTrader 8\workspaces.
